DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Garet D. O'Keefe, Esq. of O'Keefe & O'Keefe LLP, 510-540-8320, appearing for Plaintiff. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is overruled, ten days to answer. Request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in Open Court.(302CWW/XCH)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
